patch_rows.alias: 23 Antares DC MD Monster Drive 2023- - Casting Reels
patch_rows.evidence_text: To maximize the chance to catch them, Antares DC MD has sturdy metal frames, enlarged 38mm dia, 21mm width spools, 20lb(JP)-100m line capacity, and fast gear ratios. MD tuned DC brake system is more finely tuned to draw the best performance from Magnum Light 3 spools to cast bulky large baits in comforts. Another ball bearing is added to main shaft support to remove plays and to improve cranking power.
patch_rows.source_binding_key: SRED50020 | SRE5004 | 2023 | ANTARES DC MD HG RIGHT
patch_rows.rejected_candidate_reason: Candidate is generic wording, not an explicit material field.
patch_rows.year_scope_note: Bind to 2023 ANTARES DC MD. Same-series body material may differ across other years.
patch_rows.fitment_note: Manual override based on review knowledge: 2023 ANTARES DC MD body material is Magnesium.
patch_rows.review_note: Reject candidate 'metal frames' because it is not a specific material.

patch_rows.alias: 24 Metanium DC (digital control) Japan model 2024-
patch_rows.approved_value_raw: CORESOLID BODY 镁合金一体成型
patch_rows.evidence_text: All New Shimano 2024 Metanium DC is the versatile bait caster for all around use. Core solid metal body holds every components solid. The state of arts i-DC5 brake system casts very smooth for long, and the new material dial is changeable without opening the side plate. MGL 3 spool offers fast spool acceleration.
patch_rows.source_binding_key: SRED50103 | SRE5015 | 2024 | Metanium DC 70
patch_rows.rejected_candidate_reason: Candidate is marketing/technology wording rather than the reviewed body material statement.
patch_rows.year_scope_note: Bind to 2024 Metanium DC. Body material wording may differ across other Metanium DC years.
patch_rows.fitment_note: Manual override based on review knowledge: 2024 Metanium DC uses CORESOLID BODY magnesium one-piece body wording.
patch_rows.review_note: Reject candidate 'Core solid metal body' because it is a technology phrase, not a precise material expression.
